title: Retry Safety, Replayability, Backoff, Jitter, and Retry Budgets · Go Client Systems · Contract Triage
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for retry safety, replayability, backoff, jitter, and retry budgets, producing bounded retry and replay decision engine. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http bounded retry and replay decision engine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners pr…
objectives: Classify retry candidates from operation semantics, failure phase, response status, caller budget, and server guidance. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Prove request bodies and credential state can be reconstructed before replaying an attempt. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Apply capped exponential backoff with an explicit jitter strategy and deterministic test clock. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Retryable Classification
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent sees one reset, Retry-After:6, then 503 while a nested helper also retries. Prove method and body replayability, cap attempts and elapsed budget, apply deterministic jitter, and prevent duplicate or amplified work. Competency probe: Classify retry candidates from operation semantics, failure phase, response status, caller budget, and server guidance. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Retryable Classification trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
